name: Contentstack
description: Monitor Contentstack enterprise headless CMS for team access and content delivery compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Contentstack at https://app.contentstack.com
2. Go to Account Settings > Tokens > Auth Tokens
3. Generate a new auth token
4. Determine your region from your Contentstack URL:
   - US: api.contentstack.io
   - EU: eu-api.contentstack.com
   - AU: au-api.contentstack.com
   - Azure NA: azure-na-api.contentstack.com
   - Azure EU: azure-eu-api.contentstack.com
5. Enter both values below

credentialFields.label: Auth Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Contentstack Account → Tokens → Auth Tokens

credentialFields.label: API Region
credentialFields.helpText: Your Contentstack region API host. Examples: api.contentstack.io (US), eu-api.contentstack.com (EU), au-api.contentstack.com (AU)

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Contentstack organization users with access to content management

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Contentstack CMS platform is operational
